title: Notifications - Onboarding - Don't Allow, dialog
scenario: Notifications toggle in App Settings > General shows OS redirect dialog when re-enabled after selecting "Don't Allow" during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. During onboarding, when prompted for notification permissions, select "Don't Allow".
4. Navigate to App Settings → General → Notifications.
5. Tap the "Notifications" toggle to enable it.
expected: A dialog appears stating: "You must go to your OS settings to turn back on Notifications" with Cancel and Go to Settings buttons.
